name: FormattedTextComponent
description:
Formatted-text component renders sanitized HTML content with configurable link behavior.

This component accepts HTML text input and renders it after sanitization.
Only safe HTML tags are preserved; potentially dangerous content is stripped.

inputs.name: convertedLinksDefaultTarget
inputs.description: Target attribute for anchor tags in the formatted content.

inputs.name: htmlText
inputs.description: HTML text content to be formatted and rendered.
